arts.ttl: Getafe vs Real Madrid 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Getafe just three days ahead of the Copa del Rey Final against Barcelona. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Asencio, Tchouameni, Fran Garcia, Camavinga, Ceballos, Valverde, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius.

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister makes Real Madrid admission in response to Liverpool exit links
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been credited with an interest in Alexis Mac Allister and whilst that news has reached the World Cup winner he has no desire to leave Liverpool

arts.ttl: Liverpool star breaks silence over Real Madrid transfer rumours
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is already believed to have agreed personal terms to move to Madrid on a free transfer when his contract ends this summer and recent speculation has suggested that Real are keen to see Liverpool teammate Alexis Mac Allister join him. However, Mac Allister brushed off the rumours and insisted he was happy in Liverpool, with the Argentine instead committed to his performances on the pitch.

arts.ttl: Messi wants Real Madrid star at Inter Miami: Beckham says yes to deal
arts.sum: Barcelona legend Lionel Messi is reportedly keen to link up with one of his former Real Madrid rivals this summer as his latest superstar teammate at Inter Miami. Messi wants Real Madrid star at Inter Miami: Beckham says yes to deal

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard makes pointed dig as Arsenal captain opens up on Real Madrid victory
arts.sum: Arsenal secured a statement success over Real Madrid in the last eight of the Champions League with Martin Odegaard hailing their attacking approach in the Bernabeu

arts.ttl: Vinicius Jr risks two-year BAN as bombshell FIFA probe puts Real Madrid star's new contract in doubt
arts.sum: The Brazil attacker is on the verge of signing an extension with Los Blancos - but those plans could be put in jeopardy

arts.ttl: Figo: What happened to Ancelotti after defeat vs. Arsenal is ‘absurd’
arts.sum: Former Inter star Luis Figo defends Carlo Ancelotti and feels that doubts over his future...

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick launches impassioned defence of Carlo Ancelotti amid sack speculation
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly ready to sack Carlo Ancelotti and Barcelona manager Hansi Flick has weighed in on the discussion.

arts.ttl: Saudi reacts to Vini Jr contract bomb: €300m offer for Raphinha
arts.sum: Vini Jr has stunned the Saudi Pro League by agreeing a new contract with Real Madrid, but Raphinha has emerged as a ‘Plan B’, with a €300 million bid planned for the Barcelona star. The Saudi Pro League has seen superstars Mo Salah and Vini Jr knock them back already this year, but now it is preparing a massive move for Raphinha, who has emerged as a leading contender to win the Ballon d’Or thanks to his stellar performances with Barca.

arts.ttl: “I’m fine at Liverpool” – Liverpool star finally breaks silence and dismisses Real Madrid rumours
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is not the only Liverpool player who has been linked with a move to Real Madrid in recent weeks. Alexis Mac Allister, who has enjoyed a highly successful season with Arne Slot’s team, is also on the radar of the Spanish club according to some reports.
